name: oc-tui
description: OpenComputer Ink+React TUI — Hermes shell, OC backend.

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/entry.tsx --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/entry.js --packages=bundle --alias:react-devtools-core=./src/devtools-stub.js --external:yoga-wasm-web --jsx=automatic --jsx-import-source=react --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cR } from 'module';const require = __cR(import.meta.url);" && chmod +x dist/entry.js
